title: palicourea valenzuelana
intro: Palicourea valenzuelana, also known as "yerba de San Juan" or "yerba de San Juanillo", is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Palicourea valenzuelana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in some regions.
